channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: 🔥 Flow Capital tokenizes a $150M private credit fund on DigiFT, eyeing $30M more this year. Could blockchain unlock illiquid credit? https://Blockchain.News/news/flow-capital-150m-private-credit-fund-tokenization-digift #CryptoFinance #Tokenization #PrivateCredit
